sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13628" key="a)porri/yimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-ρρίψιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that should be thrown away,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.85</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
